metadata.description: Local marketplace of helper plugins for the Catalonia region.

plugins.name: catalonia-trip-advisor
plugins.description: Travel advisor for tourists visiting Catalonia and Barcelona — itineraries, day trips, transport, neighborhoods, food, scams, and culture.

plugins.name: catalonia-real-estate
plugins.description: Real estate buying advisor for Catalonia — buying process, price and area benchmarks, taxes, resident vs. non-resident financing, and live listing search across Idealista, Fotocasa, and Habitaclia.
